# LoansForDevelopers

> LoansForDevelopers (loansfordevelopers.com) — Matches real estate developers and builders with licensed specialists for bridge/construction introductions, DSCR exit refinances that retire hard money on schedule, cash-out on project income, and the Investor HELOC. LoansForDevelopers is an AdaptLend service (adaptlend.com) and is not a lender.

## Key facts

- DSCR exit refinances pay off bridge/hard money on the property's rent; most lenders want 3–6 months seasoning for cash-out at new appraised value.
- LLC vesting is standard across bridge, construction, and DSCR lending.
- Developers' personal borrowing can qualify on deposits despite depreciation-heavy returns.
- The Investor HELOC provides standing acquisition capital — interest only on draws.
- Filling out the form does not affect credit; a credit check only happens if the borrower moves forward with a specialist.

## How it works

1. Answer a few plain-English questions (about two minutes, no credit check).
2. LoansForDevelopers matches the borrower with a licensed specialist for this exact situation.
3. The specialist contacts the borrower within one business day; the match also arrives by email.

## Related resources

- [DSCR loan guide](https://lumolend.com/guides/dscr-loans/) — LumoLend, an Honest Casa company
- [Fix-and-flip and bridge loan guide](https://lumolend.com/guides/fix-and-flip-bridge-loans/) — LumoLend
- [Free DSCR calculator](https://lumolend.com/tools/dscr-calculator/) — LumoLend
- [LumoLend](https://lumolend.com/) — price purchase, refinance, and HELOC scenarios with live indicative rates; free calculators and 40+ mortgage guides
